channel.title: GitHub 高星新项目
channel.description: 最近7天新建的 Star>50 的 GitHub 项目

item.description: AI-friendly PPT builder skill: 17 hand-polished Chinese PPTX templates + non-destructive text-only editing tools (python-pptx based). Pick a template, write edits.json, build a real .pptx with the layout intact. Personal/research use only. | Language: Python | Stars: 1494

item.description: Your AI forgets. This remembers. Spec-driven coding harness for vibecoders, product owners, CEOs and real builders — self-improving context memory, 12 agents, 32 skills. Any stack. 30 seconds | Topics: agentic, ai-agents, ai-coding-assistant, ai-development, ai-workflow, anthropic, claude, claude-code, cli-tools, code-quality | Language: JavaScript | Stars: 707

item.title: JuneYaooo/nihaixia-tcm [Python] (228 stars)
item.description: 倪海厦中医课程资料的 Agent Skill：支持课程检索、方证穴位辨析、学习笔记整理与板书截图证据索引。 | An Agent Skill for Ni Haixia TCM course study, formula-pattern lookup, acupoint reference, and screenshot evidence indexing. | Topics: acupuncture, agent-skills, claude-code-skills, codex-skill, nihaixia, shennong, tcm, tcmcp, traditional-chinese-medicine, traditional-chinese-medicine-healthcare | Language: Python | Stars: 228

item.title: ProxyShard/ShardBrowser [TypeScript] (213 stars)
item.description: Free, open-source anti-detect browser launcher for web scraping and multi-accounting. By the ProxyShard team. Engine-level fingerprint spoofing in Chromium 148 (WebGL / WebGPU / Client Hints / fonts / TLS), 170+ device profiles bundled, stable QUIC + WebRTC over SOCKS5. | Topics: ai-agents, anti-detect-browser, antidetect-browser, browser-fingerprinting, chromium, fingerprint, headless-browser, headless-chrome, multi-accounting, playwright | Language: TypeScript | Stars: 213
